Class File

java.lang.Object
File
public class File extends Object
A class of files in a file system
Version:
1.0
Author:
Obe Willaert, Arthur Pintelon, Mauro Devolder
Invariants:
The name is always valid (only letters, digits, '.', '-', '_'; never empty)
0 <= getSize() && getSize() <= getMaxSize()
getCreationTime() != null
If getModificationTime() != null then getModificationTime().after(getCreationTime())

  • Constructor Details

    • File

      public File(String name, int size, boolean writable)
      Creates a new File with given name, size and writability.
      Parameters:
      name -
      size -
      writable -
      Preconditions:
      size >= 0 && size <= getMaxSize()
      Postconditions:
      getName() is a valid non-empty name derived from the parameter (or "defaultName")
      getSize() == size
      isWritable() == writable
      getCreationTime() equals the moment of creation
      getModificationTime() == null (file not yet modified)

    • File

      public File(String name)
      Creates a new empty writable file with the given name.
      Parameters:
      name -
      Postconditions:
      getName() is valid, getSize() == 0, isWritable() == true, creation time set, modification time still null

  • Method Details

    • isValidChar

      public static boolean isValidChar(char c)
      Checks whether a character is allowed in a file name.
      Parameters:
      c -
      Returns:
      true if c is a letter (A-Za-z), digit (0-9), '.', '-' or '_'

    • setNameCreation

      private void setNameCreation(String name)
      Internal helper that sets a valid name. Invalid characters are removed and null/empty are set to "defaultName".

    • enlarge

      public void enlarge(int enlargeSize)
      Increases the size of the file.
      Parameters:
      enlargeSize -
      Throws:
      NotWritableException - if !isWritable()
      Preconditions:
      enlargeSize > 0
      getSize() + enlargeSize <= getMaxSize()
      Postconditions:
      getSize() == old size + enlargeSize
      getModificationTime() is updated to current time

    • shorten

      public void shorten(int shortenSize)
      Decreases the size of the file.
      Parameters:
      shortenSize -
      Throws:
      NotWritableException - if !isWritable()
      Preconditions:
      shortenSize > 0
      getSize() - shortenSize >= 0
      Postconditions:
      getSize() == old size - shortenSize
      getModificationTime() is updated

    • hasOverlappingUsePeriod

      public boolean hasOverlappingUsePeriod(File other)
      Checks whether the use period of this file overlaps with the given file.
      Parameters:
      other - the other file
      Returns:
      true if the use periods overlap else false

    • getName

      public String getName()

    • setName

      public void setName(String name)
      Changes the name of this file.
      Parameters:
      name -
      Throws:
      NotWritableException - if !isWritable()
      Postconditions:
      getName() is a valid name derived from the parameter
      getModificationTime() is updated

    • getSize

      public long getSize()

      private void setSize(long size)
